headline: Maryland Rep. April McClain Delaney Sold Over $11K Worth of Core & Main Stock: Here’s What You Should Know
summary: Records from July 7, 2026 indicate that Representative April McClain Delaney of Maryland made a sale of Core & Main (NYSE:CNM), valued between $11,011 and $165,000, with the transaction dated June 12, 2026 and filed
